items.claim: Dion Barbosza has a higher level of experience against quality opponents than Anna Melisano.
Alvin Hines has better conditioning and can maintain a higher pace than RJ Harris.
items.quote: for a blob, Alvin Hines is quite well conditioned. Like, he can push a bit of a pace.

items.claim: Alvin Hines possesses a significant experience advantage over RJ Harris.
items.quote: Alvin Hines has been around in MMA a lot longer than RJ Harris has.

items.claim: Alden Corer is physically larger than Stuart Nickel.
items.quote: Cory is also going to be a a bit bigger than Stuart Nickel. Um 5'8 versus 5'5.

items.claim: Stuart Nickel lacks the ability to inflict significant damage on his opponents.
items.quote: there's just no ability to like harm his opponent.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. tested positive for PEDs during his Contender Series appearance.
Felipe Franco has already adjusted to the UFC environment after his previous fight.
items.quote: he's already got over his octagon jitters.

items.claim: Sakyong Ko possesses superior grappling ability compared to Jean Paul Leos Noyani.
items.quote: Sakyong Ko dominated Philip Bro over three rounds. Completely ragdoled him in the grappling

items.claim: Jean Paul Leos Noyani's striking technique is rudimentary outside of his explosive first-round attacks.
items.quote: stand up outside of the first round where it can be explosive and you get a finish is a little bit rudimentary

items.claim: Jose Miguel Delgado holds a significant size advantage over Austin Bashi.
items.quote: he's going to have a massive size advantage
